title: GEP Asset Management
description: Asset store, call logging, content hashing, and integrity checks for evolved artifacts

modules.name: AssetCallLog
modules.notes: Non-fatal: logging failures never block evolution

modules.name: Assets
modules.notes: normalizeAsset ensures schema_version and asset_id are present

modules.name: ContentHash
implementation_notes: computeContentHash: recursively serializes object with sorted keys, then SHA256
computeAssetId: excludes certain fields (asset_id, schema_version), returns 'sha256:' + hash
verifyAssetId: recomputes expected ID, compares to asset.asset_id
Code is obfuscated with RC4-like string cipher + encoded string table

modules.name: IntegrityCheck
implementation_notes: Reads a hash registry file at {__dirname}/../../<registry_path>
Registry contains entries with {path, hash} pairs
For each entry, computes SHA256 of file content, compares to stored hash
waitForIntegrityDelay: returns resolved Promise if no violation; random delay if violated
wrapIfViolated: merges {ok: false, error: 'internal...'} onto result object if violated
Code is obfuscated with same RC4-like cipher pattern as contentHash.js

key_relationships: AssetStore depends_on ContentHash (computeAssetId, SCHEMA_VERSION via ensureSchemaFields)
Assets depends_on ContentHash (computeAssetId, SCHEMA_VERSION via normalizeAsset)
AssetStore manages Capsule objects (loadCapsules, appendCapsule, upsertCapsule, appendFailedCapsule)
AssetCallLog manages AssetCallEntry objects (logAssetCall, readCallLog, summarizeCallLog)
call_chains: loadGenes() → readJsonIfExists(genes.json) + readFileSync(genes.jsonl) → deduplicate by id
loadCapsules() → readJsonIfExists(capsules.json) + readFileSync(capsules.jsonl) → deduplicate by id
readRecentCandidates(limit) → stat file size → full read if <1MB, else tail-read via fd
checkIntegrity() [IntegrityCheck] → readHashRegistry() → for each entry: SHA256(file) → compare hash
wrapIfViolated(result) → wasViolated() → if true: Object.assign(result, {ok:false, error:'internal...'})
important_notes: Both genes and capsules have dual storage: JSON (primary) + JSONL (append-only), merged on load with JSONL overwriting by id
writeJsonAtomic uses .tmp file + rename for crash safety
readRecentCandidates and readRecentExternalCandidates are tail-optimized for large files (>1MB uses fd/seek)
failed_capsules.json is bounded: trimmed to 100 entries when it exceeds 200
AssetCallLog is per-evolution-run (stored in evolutionDir), AssetStore is global (stored in gepAssetsDir)
contentHash.js and integrityCheck.js are obfuscated with RC4-like string cipher; contentHash exports SCHEMA_VERSION, computeContentHash, computeAssetId, verifyAssetId
integrityCheck.js implements anti-tamper: verifies SHA256 hashes of project files against a registry; caches result; exposes violation flag and delay/wrap helpers
buildValidationCmd generates repo-root-relative node validation commands for use in Gene.validation arrays
